subject: Accounting
title: Accounts Payable Tracking
description: A fast breakdown of Accounts Payable Tracking for builders.

hook.text: A supplier sends 30 invoices a month. Missing a payment deadline means late fees—or losing the supplier.

buildup.text: Accounts payable tracks what the business owes—invoices received, payment terms, and due dates.

discovery.text: Many suppliers offer early payment discounts—2% off if paid within 10 days instead of 30.

twist.text: Missing a 2/10 discount on a $100,000 invoice costs $2,000—the equivalent of 36% annual interest.

climax.text: Well-managed payables optimize cash flow by timing payments to capture discounts.

punchline.text: Pay on time. Pay early when the discount is worth it.

quiz.question: Why should businesses pay attention to early payment discounts?
options: Missing them can be equivalent to very high interest rates
They reduce the amount of goods received
